title: 分詞構句（被動）p.p. / Having been p.p....

formulas.zh: 過去分詞開頭的分詞構句，代替被動副詞子句
強調先完成的被動動作，再進行主句動作

explanation: 被動分詞構句省略 being 或 having been，以過去分詞開頭代替被動副詞子句（because/when + S + was/were + p.p.）。單純 P.P. 表示與主句動作同時或之後的被動狀態；Having been + P.P. 強調在主句動作前已完成的被動動作。注意：主詞必須與分詞邏輯主詞相同，避免懸垂修飾詞錯誤。此句型常見於學測閱讀與寫作題。

examples.eng: Defeated in the battle, the general surrendered to the enemy.
examples.chi: 在戰役中被擊敗，那位將軍向敵人投降了。

examples.eng: Having been rejected three times, she finally gave up on her dream.
examples.chi: 被拒絕了三次之後，她最終放棄了夢想。

examples.eng: Shocked by the news, the students couldn't focus on their studies.
examples.chi: 被這個消息震驚，學生們無法專心讀書。

examples.eng: Having been trained for years, the athlete won the gold medal easily.
examples.chi: 經過多年訓練，那位運動員輕鬆贏得金牌。

extension.tip: 判斷依據：看句首是否為過去分詞形式（-ed 或不規則 p.p.）。若要表達「在某動作完成後」才進行主句動作，必用 Having been + p.p.；若只表達同時的被動狀態，用 P.P. 即可。留意主詞一致性：分詞的邏輯主詞必須是主句主詞。

examples.test: Shocked by the accident, he forgot what to do. vs. Having been shocked...
examples.result: → 第一句表同時狀態（恐慌時忘記）；第二句強調先被嚇到，後忘記（時間順序明確）

examples.test: ❌ Injured in the accident, the car was damaged. vs. ✓ Injured in the accident, John was hospitalized.
examples.result: → 第一句錯誤（分詞主詞應是 John 非 car）；第二句正確

examples.test: Having been criticized repeatedly, the plan was abandoned. vs. Criticized repeatedly, the plan was abandoned.
examples.result: → 第一句強調多次批評後才放棄；第二句同時敘述，兩者都可但語氣不同

extension.note: 口訣：「分詞主詞要一致，Having been 強調時間序」

parts: by the storm, the farmer decided to postpone the harvest.
exercises.sentence: Battered by the storm, the farmer decided to postpone the harvest.
exercises.translation: 被暴風雨摧殘，農民決定延後收割。

parts: for six months, she finally completed her research project.
exercises.sentence: Having been assigned the task for six months, she finally completed her research project.
exercises.translation: 被分配這項任務六個月後，她終於完成了研究專案。

parts: three times, the applicant was determined to try once more.
exercises.sentence: Rejected three times, the applicant was determined to try once more.
exercises.translation: 被拒絕三次，申請人決心再試一次。

parts: for academic excellence, the student became more confident in class.
exercises.sentence: Having been recognized for academic excellence, the student became more confident in class.
exercises.translation: 因為在學術上獲得認可，這位學生在課堂上變得更有信心。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的分詞構句完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ by the noise, the student couldn't concentrate on studying.
mc_exercises.explanation: 被動分詞構句用過去分詞（Disturbed）表示主詞所受的狀態，相當於「Because the student was disturbed...」。選項A（現在分詞）表主動，與句意不符；C雖正確但冗長不合慣用；D為不定式用法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷被動分詞構句的正確形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ from the meeting, the employee felt relieved and decided to take the rest of the day off.
mc_exercises.explanation: 過去分詞（Dismissed）是標準的被動分詞構句形式，省略了「being」。選項A過於冗長；C為主動且邏輯錯誤（員工不能dismiss自己）；D為動詞原形，不符文法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇強調先發生動作的被動分詞構句
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ multiple times by investors, the startup founder refused to give up on her project.
mc_exercises.explanation: 「Having been rejected」強調在「refuse」之前已經完成的被動動作。選項B只表同時狀態，不合句意的「多次拒絕後」的邏輯關係；A為主動形；D表進行中的被動狀態，時間邏輯不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜語境中選擇正確的被動分詞構句形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ in poverty for generations, yet _______ the opportunity to receive education, the village finally began to develop economically.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空用「Having been trapped」強調在發展之前長期陷於貧困的完成被動狀態；第二空用「given」表同時狀態（獲得教育機會）。選項A「having given」邏輯錯誤（村莊不能給予機會）；B時間邏輯不清；C第一空主動形不當。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 被老師表揚後，這名學生感到非常驕傲。
translation_exercises.answer: Praised by the teacher, the student felt very proud.
hints: 提示1：使用單純P.P.形式表示與主句動作同時的被動狀態，省略 being
提示2：注意 praised 的邏輯主詞必須是 student，避免懸垂修飾詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 因為被學校錄取了，小明決定努力準備高中生活。
translation_exercises.answer: Admitted to the school, Xiaoming decided to work hard preparing for high school life.
hints: 提示1：分詞構句可替代 because/when + 被動副詞子句，此處表達被動原因
提示2：Admitted 的邏輯主詞必須是句子主詞 Xiaoming；避免寫成 'Being admitted'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 既然教室已經被打掃乾淨了，班級會議就可以開始了。
translation_exercises.answer: Having been cleaned thoroughly, the classroom was ready for the class meeting to begin.
key_points: Having been cleaned (完成被動分詞)
強調先於主句的被動動作
hints: 提示1：使用 Having been + P.P. 強調分詞動作發生於主句動作之前的被動情況
提示2：注意時間先後關係：已被打掃(先) → 會議開始(後)；邏輯主詞必須是 classroom

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 由於受到社交媒體的廣泛影響，許多青少年開始反思他們的網路使用習慣。
translation_exercises.answer: Influenced extensively by social media, many teenagers began to reflect on their online usage habits.
key_points: by + agent (社交媒體為被動施事者)
邏輯主詞複數一致 (many teenagers)
hints: 提示1：分詞構句的被動形式可表達原因關係，此處 Influenced 替代 because they were influenced by...
提示2：邏輯主詞 teenagers 必須與主句主詞一致；避免誤寫成 'Being influenced' 或造成懸垂修飾詞（如主詞為 'social media' 則邏輯錯誤）
